items.wbCaptionText: An intimate space warmed by candlelight and the glow of our open wood-fire grill.
Our signature cut, aged 45 days in-house and finished over cherry wood.
Every cut cooked over an open wood-fire grill for that unmistakable char and smoke.
Our bar team creates seasonal cocktails to complement every course.
A sweet finish — from dark chocolate fondant to vanilla crème brûlée.
An exclusive space for up to 20 guests — perfect for celebrations and corporate dinners.
